ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ad campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the ad campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ad campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "ad_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of advertisement used */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the campaign was run */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the campaign was conducted */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales generated during the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_ad_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_type_id") REFERENCES ad_types ("ad_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_types" (
  "ad_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad type */,
  "ad_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad type (e.g., TV, Radio, Newspaper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ad type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ad type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Christmas, Summer, Standard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */,
  "country_currency" TEXT /* Country currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_spend" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad spend entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "ad_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad type */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Amount spent on the ad type for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad spend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad spend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_spend_ad_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_type_id") REFERENCES ad_types ("ad_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_spend_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount generated by the campaign */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_sales_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metrics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metrics entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on Investment (ROI) for the campaign */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-Through Rate (CTR) for the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks generated by the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (sales) generated by the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metrics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target */,
  "target_sales" REAL /* Target sales amount for the campaign */,
  "target_roi" REAL /* Target Return on Investment (ROI) for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the target audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the target audience */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the target audience */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the target audience */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the target audience */,
  "audience_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the target audience */,
  "audience_size" INTEGER /* Size of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_audiences_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing analyst, regional manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the campaign was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, ROI, audience) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or comment */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_feedback_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
